title: Integrate EMA/load_factor/density into lichen-gateway and RPL DIO signaling
description: Add RfHealthMetrics to Gateway/RplNode state. Update process_rpl, announce, DIO generation to include density, EMA-derived SF, load_factor per CCP-16 and spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md. Use lichen-core::rf_health. Ensure metrics updated from received packets. No dead code.
